title: Delphine Arceneaux's Original Coordinate Note
description: The original handwritten note at Delphine Arceneaux's position at the Algiers Point ferry landing, from which Terrence Guidry copied his transcription. Delphine's note reads the northing coordinate clearly as '3001.4' — the correct value. The transposition error is confirmed as Terrence's alone, introduced during the low-light transcription. Delphine's source was a National Guard sergeant who verbally relayed the coordinates from the emergency operations post's own survey map.
